name: Localo (formerly Surfer Local)
description:
What Localo Does

Localo is a powerful AI-supported local SEO tool designed to enhance business profiles on Google Business Profile. It consists of intelligent AI that automates and optimizes Google posts, review replies, and business profile information.

Localo suits business owners, SEO agencies, and freelancers who want to improve their local search visibility. It enables users to readily manage reviews and post updates.

Source: G2

Key Features

Localo’s primary features include:

  • Intelligent AI that helps automate, schedule, and optimize Google posts,
  • Localo supports you in boosting business profiles on Google Business Profile and has listing management.
  • Localo has a position checker to track Google’s local rankings
  • Its AI-supported review manager replies to reviews and enhances online credibility.
  • Localo’s local rank checker evaluates business visibility and does competitor analyses.

Benefits of Localo

The main benefits from Localo are:

  • Users can automatically schedule Google posts and photos, helping save time and guaranteeing regular updates without manual input.
  • Localo’s optimization toolset enables you to enhance your Google Business Profile (GBP), manage your GBP listings, and update and optimize your business profile information.
  • You can boost your Google Business Profile's position with local SEO, making it easier for customers to find you.
  • Localo performs competitor analysis, enabling you to gain insights to stay ahead.
  • The review manager improves customer relations through features like automated review responses.

Pricing

Three plans are available with Localo:

  • Free Plan: Essential SEO tools.
  • Growth: USD 29 per location /month.
  • Agency: USD 99 per/month for the first 4 locations.

Pros

✅GBP (Google Business Profile) post scheduling and profile optimization.

✅Competitor analyses.

✅Localo features listings management.

Cons

🚫White labeling and advanced features are only available in higher-tier plans.

🚫Focused on GBP and does not cover all SEO requirements entirely.
